name: chatmessage
title: ChatMessage
description: Agent-thread message: bot chip or user avatar, meta row, hover copy/retry actions, streaming caret.

files.content:
Agent-thread message: bot chip or user avatar, meta row, hover copy/retry actions, streaming caret.

```jsx
<ChatMessage role="user" name="Ada Obi" time="14:02">Deploy the staging branch.</ChatMessage>
<ChatMessage time="14:02" streaming>Provisioning a runner…</ChatMessage>
```
